purpose: Acquire rare PubChemQC regions not explicitly targeted by the broad or residual-hard rounds.

priority_buckets.predicate: 3.2 <= gap <= 5.5 and heteroatom fraction >= 0.25 and N+O+S >= 3

selection_rules: Exclude the complete 1.5M table, repair union, residual round, and all 824K accepted broad/general/hard candidates by CID and canonical SMILES.
Use two stable source-file shards so concurrent kernels scan disjoint source files.
Keep source exhaustion visible; never fill a rare quota with balanced-general rows.
Treat this output as candidate inventory only until residual-guided selection and a fixed pure-2D gate are complete.
